name: Coriander Chutney (Dhania Ka Chatni)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the coriander leaves and chop them roughly. You may include some of the stalks.
- 6 ounces of chopped coriander leaves will fill approximately a 1 pint container when pressed gently.
2. Peel the onion and slice it into small pieces.
3. Squeeze the juice from the lemons into a blender or liquidizer.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (including the coriander) to the blender with the lemon juice.
- Blend until smooth. If needed, add a little water to ensure the chutney remains liquid.
5. Serve immediately, or pour the mixture into a jar with a screw-top lid and store it in the refrigerator for up to one week. Alternatively, keep some aside for immediate use and freeze the rest.
